message:
fix(search-core): resolve clippy errors in fusion and rollout tests

- fusion.rs: Remove incompatible #[allow(unsafe_code)] from test module
  (crate forbids unsafe code)
- fusion.rs: Add test-specific clippy allows for cast precision, float_cmp,
  suboptimal_flops
- rollout.rs: Fix field_reassign_with_default by using struct init syntax
- rollout.rs: Add test-specific clippy allows

All 226 search-core tests pass, cargo clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
